Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}Have you considered returning to school at all?[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}It's been some time since second semester started... Regarding your attendance, it'd be best if you went back as soon as possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...I got the paperwork, but I don't remember saying anything about turning it in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}What's the point, anyhow? I got no business there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}...I apologize, it isn't my place to ask that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 10 25 25}Everything is my fault. I shouldn't have gotten you or Akihiko involved...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'm the one who chose to join you back then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}However things turned out after that has nothin' to do with you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I didn't know what I was capable of... That's all there is to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}Then why are you so determined not to return to school?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 2 25 25}You'll be throwing your future away if you don't go back![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}I don't plan on forcing you into anything, like I did in the past.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}What's important is it's your own decision, Aragaki.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Looks like you have changed... just a little bit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You always used to avoid relying on people. Not so much of a lone wolf anymore, huh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}The only choice we have is to keep moving forward. That goes for myself, Akihiko... and you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}So please, Aragaki, just give it another chance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}What are you guys up to?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Looks like a pretty serious discussion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Lemme guess, Miss President is lecturing the delinquent on the importance of his education?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}For a protein-fueled, musclebound moron, you're pretty smart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...See ya, Miss President. This delinquent's gonna go to his room and think about his bad choices.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Uh... What just happened...? Was it something I said?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Well, that's nothing new. They'll get over it eventually.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}It's nothing new. I'll just apologize later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} improved[n]after hearing Aragaki's perspective...[n]{f 1 1}
